items.name: Health
items.detail: Health(full) = round(WI × (MW+1) + 0.25 × Strength × Endurance); WI = round(Endurance + 4 + 0.4×Spirit); MW = min(floor(Endurance/2)+1, 3). Felled at cumulative damage ≥ Health (D-A, ED-1021).
items.notes: combat_v30.md:517 comment retained '(End+6) x (MW+1)' wording pre-D-A weight terms in some places — verify propagation of the ED-1021 Spirit/Strength terms into combat_v30.md prose.

items.name: Wound penalty (fractional Ob per wound)
items.detail: Combat: +0.15 Ob attacking / +0.25 Ob defending per wound (ED-1041, per Jordan ruling 2026-07-08 ED-PC-0005), superseding PP-716's universal −1D. Non-combat pools (Thread ops, fieldwork, mass-battle Command) get a fractional-Ob-per-wound value flagged pending (ED-PC-0006).
key_bindings_seen: stat_deltas-style wound channel referenced generically, no Key payload example located in this family

items.name: Stamina
items.detail: CURRENT (derived_stats, RATIFIED S1 2026-05-29): (3×Endurance)+(2×Spirit), range 5–47. Recovery: Take a Breath restores (Endurance + relevant History)×2, capped at max. combat_v30.md:303 still states the OLD formula 'Stamina = Endurance × 5 (range 5–35)... (ED-694, replaces composite formula)' with recovery 'Recover Stamina by Endurance score' (combat_v30.md:98) — no S1 propagation.
items.notes: See Finding re: combat_v30.md stale Stamina formula.

items.name: Composure / Face / Concentration (social-contest trackers)
items.detail: Composure (buffer magnitude) = Charisma × 3, range 3–21 — RETIRED as the social-contest tracker name (CR3, ED-1056, 2026-06-01) and re-homed as Face: Face_max = Charisma×3; Face_current = round(Standing÷10 × Face_max). Concentration = (3×Focus)+(2×Spirit), range 5–35, depletes 5/exchange (ED-890/DEP), −5 on loss.
aliases_or_variants: Composure (retained name in combat/knots/conviction per ED-1056 scoping note, social_contest_v30.md:509-512)
items.notes: ED-1056 explicitly scopes the Composure→Face rename to social-contest only; combat/knots/conviction keep 'Composure' — self-documented, not re-litigated here (KNOWN-TRACKED).

items.name: Argue Pool
items.detail: Headline/repeated form in social_contest_v30.md: '(Primary Attribute × 2) + History bonus' (History bonus = points+3, per line 135). Style/audience bonus dice (up to +2D, line 78) are 'added to the Argue pool at Step 3' but never folded into the three repeated 'Argue Pool =' statements. derived_stats_v30.md:585 states the complete form: '(Primary × 2) + History + 3 + style'.
items.notes: See Finding: incomplete formula repeated 3x in its own home doc.

items.name: Thread Pool / TPS
items.detail: Pool = (Spirit×2) + History bonus (points+3) + Thread Pool Score (TPS = TS÷10, round down) — PP-619/PP-624/PP-625/PP-616, consistently restated ~7 times across Leap/Weave/Pull/Lock/Dissolution/Mending in threadwork_v30.md with no divergence found among those restatements.

items.name: Thread Fatigue
items.detail: Threshold = Spirit × 5, range 5–35, counts up from 0 to threshold (thread exhaustion). Per-operation costs table (Leap 3, Passive sensing 2, Mending 4, Pulling 5, Locking 7, Dissolution 10).

items.name: Coherence
items.detail: 0–10 (or 10→0 in some framings), monotonic-drain personal track; explicitly NOT a derived value ('a permanent degradation track', derived_stats_v30.md:261). Mending costs 0 Coherence (asymmetry, threadwork_v30.md:481); other ops cost 0/−1/−1(cap) by band.

items.name: TroopCount / Size / block_size
items.detail: TroopCount = Size × block_size (set at muster); Size = floor(TroopCount/block_size). block_size by scale: Skirmish 10, Company 100, Battle 500, Campaign 1000, War 5000. Output scaling: effective_damage = floor(successes×(1+Power)×TroopCount/max_TroopCount), capped 1.0. Consistent between both docs.

items.name: Mass Combat Pool (unit, TTRPG mode)
items.surface: designs/provincial/mass_battle_v30.md:28 (A.1 headline), :443 (A.7 step 1, with ED-899/ED-1013 aside); designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:589 (§14.4)
items.detail: Headline/repeated form (PP-233): min(Size, Command) + Command. Line 443's own inline parenthetical says this is superseded by ED-899's engine default (2×Command with Size via Lanchester frontage, COMMAND_SIGMA_ENABLED=0) and further refined by ED-1013 to Command×(1+cohesion). derived_stats_v30.md §14.4 restates the PP-233 form with no ED-899/1013 caveat at all.
items.notes: See Finding: superseded formula still the headline/comparison-table statement in two design docs.

items.name: Mass Combat Pool (Board Game mode)
items.detail: Pool = sum of all engaged unit Martial values + commander bonus. Distinct BG-mode formula, explicitly a separate mode per doc's own 'Three-mode' framing (line 9) — not treated as a collision, catalogued for completeness.

items.name: Command (rating)
items.detail: Command = clamp(round((2×Charisma + Cognition)÷3), 1, 7) — ED-899, Charisma-primary/Cognition-secondary, supersedes the equal-weight ceil((Cha+Cog)/2) form. Single stated form found; no divergence located in this family.

items.name: Army Morale
items.detail: Army Morale = floor(average unit Morale) + Command modifier (±1) + Discipline modifier (±1). Thresholds 6+ Resolute...0 Routed. Consistent between the two citing docs.

items.name: Mandate (faction headline stat)
items.detail: Mandate(faction) = clamp(round(7·T/(T+K)),0,7), T = Σ_s W_s·(0.5·Legitimacy_s + 0.5·Popular_Support_s)/7, K=6 (size-weighted, saturating). W_s = base(Type)+Prosperity_s+FacilityTier_s (settlement_layer_v30.md:159). Agrees between faction_behavior_v30 and faction_canon_v30.
items.notes: Diverges from params/factions_personal.md:14's flat 'Mandate = round(0.5×Legitimacy+0.5×Popular_Support)' citing 'faction_behavior_v30 §4' — that section was rewritten to the saturating form under LPS-2e (2026-05-30); the params citation is now stale. This is the exact divergence flagged in the audit's baseline facts — confirmed here with citations. See Finding.

items.name: Legitimacy / Popular Support (per-settlement)
items.detail: L, PS each 0–7, per-settlement (NOT faction-level, per Jordan ruling 2026-05-30, supersedes PP-686 v2's faction-level L/PS). faction_behavior_v30.md retains its old §3.4/§3.5 per-territory dynamics formulas under an inline SUPERSEDED-BY banner rather than being rewritten/removed — old formulas (ΔLegitimacy per season etc., lines 292-328) still printed in full beneath the banner.

items.name: Faction Legitimacy (derived meter)
items.detail: Legitimacy(derived) = Mandate × 20, 0–140. Footnote (line 554) explicitly documents the LPS-1→LPS-2e correction and disclaims a 0–100 master scale.

items.name: Treasury / Reputation / Discipline / Levies Available
items.detail: Treasury = Wealth×100; Reputation = Influence×15; Discipline = Stability×10; Levies Available = Military×2 (ceiling). Full income/drain event tables at §8.1 (lines 303-360).

items.name: Settlement Prosperity / Defense / Order → Local Economy / Garrison Strength / Public Order
items.detail: Local Economy = Prosperity×50; Garrison Strength = Defense×20 + Fort Level×30; Public Order = Order×20. settlement_layer_v30.md:43 cites 'derived_stats_v1 §4' (stale section-number citation — current doc numbers this §9, not §4) as its source.

items.name: Province Accord (from settlement Order)
items.detail: Province Accord = floor(mean settlement Order across province settlements). Example given: floor((4+2+1)/3)=2.

items.name: Knot Pool
items.detail: (Bonds × 2) + 3, range 5–17D. Only occurrence located in this family sweep; not cross-checked against a dedicated knots_v30.md in this pass (out of assigned surface).

items.name: Fieldwork Pool
items.detail: (Primary Attribute × 2) + History bonus (fieldwork_v30.md:217, TN7, Ob per Depth table) matches derived_stats' '(Primary×2)+History+3' framing (History bonus already = points+3 per social_contest's convention) — consistent naming, not independently verified for the +3 constant inside fieldwork_v30.md's own prose.

items.name: Evidence Track
items.detail: Range 0 to per-investigation threshold; persistent across scenes/sessions; one track per investigation regardless of territory (Exposure tracked separately per territory).

items.name: Piety Track / Conviction / PT / CT — multi-referent name
items.detail: At least four distinct referents share the name: (a) conviction_track_v30.md — per-territory Church institutional-standing stat, 0-5, 'Conviction (PT)' (glossary-style note at :10 typos it '(CT)' vs. '(PT)' used 3x elsewhere in that doc); (b) conviction_track_v1.md — 'the personal-scale moral-belief mechanic', per-character Conviction/Scar tracker (no explicit 0-10 scale stated in the excerpt read); (c) glossary.md:86 — 'Piety Track | CT* | 0-10 | Debate position tracker, Side A wins ≥7, Side B ≤3, compromise 4-6' citing conviction_track_v1.md as canonical doc, but this description verbatim matches social_contest_v30.md:276's Persuasion Track, not conviction_track_v1.md's Scar mechanic; (d) derived_stats_v30.md:561 — 'Piety Track | 0-10 | Per character | Personal religious standing' — a fourth restatement not explicitly tied to (b) or (c).
items.notes: (a)'s narrow duplicate against tc_political_redesign_v30's 'Piety (PT)' is KNOWN-TRACKED: faction_politics_v30.md:25 (A-06, P1) and :1048 (ED-644, 'rename deferred'). The (b)/(c)/(d) cross-scale collision and glossary.md's apparent miscitation are not covered by ED-644 (which is scoped to the (a)-vs-tc_political_redesign duplicate only). See Finding.

items.name: Persuasion Track
items.detail: 0–10, banded: ≥7 Side A wins, ≤3 Side B wins, 4-6 compromise. Regroup/Concede a Point each move it ±1. Preserved unchanged by CR3 (line 481).

items.name: Disposition
items.detail: Flat −5..+5, per NPC. Decoupled from Bonds as a ceiling (ED-912, supersedes PP-684 'ceiling=Bonds'). Bonds gates Knot eligibility (≥5) and max Knot count but no longer caps Disposition.

items.name: Resonant Style / Conviction (personal worldview)
items.detail: Resonant Style ∈ {Consequence, Evidence, Authority, Solidarity, ...} determined by an NPC's Conviction; Conviction taxonomy per conviction_track_v1.md §1 (9 listed) though CLAUDE.md's baseline cites a separate 'ED-IN-0025 resonance_style retirement correction, NEEDS-JORDAN' as the tracked open item for this exact area (not re-litigated here).

items.name: Inspiration
items.detail: Total Inspiration per focus ≤ Spirit (Resolve cap, params/core L128 cited); +1D bonus when pursued genuinely, Ob −1 when spent strategically (per fieldwork_v30 §2.2, cross-referenced not independently reread in this pass).

items.name: Faction Domain Pool
items.detail: Bare faction stat, 1–7D. Only occurrence found in this family; V-1 note (§14.5, line 592-596) explicitly flags this as an intentional non-proportional scale-shift vs. personal-scale pools.

findings.claim: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md self-contradicts its own Combat Pool formula: §13 ('What Does NOT Change') states the pre-ED-901 formula as still-current, while §14.4 two sections later states that exact formula was STRUCK.
findings.evidence: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:515 ('Combat Pool: (Agi × 2) + History + 3, split offense/defense') vs designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:584 ('Combat Pool | max(5, History + 6) — Agility-independent... STRUCK old (Agility×2)+History+3 2026-06-04... ED-901').

findings.claim: designs/scene/combat_v30.md — still flagged 'the design-layer source for personal combat' for non-resolution content — carries the pre-S1-ratification Stamina formula and recovery rule with no pointer to the superseding RATIFIED S1 (2026-05-29) values that derived_stats_v30.md documents as current.
findings.evidence: designs/scene/combat_v30.md:303 ('Stamina = Endurance × 5 (range 5-35)... ED-694, replaces composite formula') and :98 ('Recover Stamina by Endurance score') vs designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:98 ('(3×Endurance)+(2×Spirit)... RATIFIED 2026-05-29 S1') and :102 ('Take a Breath: restores (Endurance + relevant combat History) × 2, capped at max') and :505 (§12 table documenting the S1 supersession explicitly).

findings.claim: The superseded PP-233 Mass Combat Pool formula (min(Size,Command)+Command) is still the headline/comparison-table statement in two design surfaces — mass_battle_v30.md's own §A.1 overview and step-1 restatement, and derived_stats_v30.md's §14.4 cross-scale comparison table — even though the same mass_battle_v30.md line that restates it also flags it superseded by ED-899/ED-1013.
findings.evidence: designs/provincial/mass_battle_v30.md:28 ('Effective Combat Pool = min(Size, Command) + Command (PP-233)') and :443 ('1. Effective Pool = min(Size, Command) + Command − Discipline penalty (PP-233...) *(ED-899:... engine default pool base = 2 × Command with Size via Lanchester frontage... ED-1013 refines this to Command × (1 + cohesion))*'); designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:589 ('Mass Combat Pool | min(Size, Command) + Command') carries no ED-899/ED-1013 caveat at all. Related to the already-known params/mass_combat.md header duplication (CLAUDE.md baseline) but this specific design-doc-headline instance is a distinct, uncited residual.

findings.claim: 'Piety Track' (and its abbreviations PT/CT) names at least four structurally different quantities across the corpus, and references/glossary.md's own entry appears to describe the wrong mechanic under that name while citing the wrong canonical doc.
findings.evidence: designs/scene/conviction_track_v30.md:14-18 (per-territory Church stat, 0-5, 'Conviction (PT)'; a glossary-style note at :10 renders it '(CT)' inconsistently with the doc's own 3 uses of '(PT)' at :16,21,23); designs/personal/conviction_track_v1.md:10 (per-character 'personal-scale moral-belief mechanic', distinct scale/mechanic); references/glossary.md:86 ('Piety Track | CT* | 0-10 | Debate position tracker. Side A wins at ≥7; Side B wins at ≤3. Compromise zone 4-6. Canonical doc: designs/personal/conviction_track_v1.md') — this description verbatim matches designs/scene/social_contest_v30.md:276 ('Persuasion Track ≥7 = Side A wins; ≤3 = Side B wins; 4-6 = compromise'), not the Scar mechanic conviction_track_v1.md actually defines; designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:561 ('Piety Track | 0-10 | Per character | Personal religious standing') restates a fourth, uncited version. The narrower (a)-vs-tc_political_redesign duplicate is separately KNOWN-TRACKED per designs/provincial/faction_politics_v30.md:25 (A-06) and :1048 (ED-644, 'rename deferred') — that ED does not cover this broader cross-scale/glossary collision.

findings.claim: The Mandate formula cited by params/factions_personal.md ('per faction_behavior_v30 §4') no longer matches what faction_behavior_v30.md §4 actually says — that section was rewritten under the LPS-2e ruling to a saturating, size-weighted aggregate, not the flat mean the params citation states. Confirms the divergence flagged in this audit's baseline facts, with exact citations.
findings.evidence: params/factions_personal.md:14 ('Mandate = round(0.5 × Legitimacy + 0.5 × Popular_Support) per faction_behavior_v30 §4') vs designs/provincial/faction_behavior_v30.md:405 ('Mandate(faction) = clamp(round(7 · T / (T + K)), 0, 7), T = Σ_s W_s·(0.5·L_s + 0.5·PS_s)/7, K = 6') and designs/provincial/faction_canon_v30.md:216 (same saturating form) and designs/territory/settlement_layer_v30.md:147-177 (§1.8, LPS-2e, the ruling that revised §4).

findings.claim: The Argue Pool 'formula' is restated three times verbatim in its own home document (social_contest_v30.md) as '(Primary Attribute × 2) + History bonus', omitting the up-to-+2D style/audience bonus dice that the same document says are added to that same pool — only derived_stats_v30.md states the complete formula.
findings.evidence: designs/scene/social_contest_v30.md:119,164,490 (three restatements of 'Argue Pool = (Primary Attribute × 2) + History bonus') vs :78 ('These dice are added to the Argue pool at Step 3 of each exchange... maximum +2D') vs designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:585 ('Argue Pool | (Primary × 2) + History + 3 + style').

findings.claim: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30_index.md is severely stale relative to its canonical head (still calls §4.1 'Vitality' not 'Health', its 32-row heading list has no trace of §14's 5 subsections or the entire post-2026-04-19 revision history visible in the body), and tools/ci_co_file_checker.py — the tool CLAUDE.md §4 names as CI-enforcing 'keep the pair in sync' for *_index.md/*_infill.md — contains no rule that checks index-file staleness at all; its four rules govern unrelated co-changes (design doc→canonical_sources.yaml, patch register→propagation_map.md, sim output→coverage_matrix.md, design doc→params file).
findings.evidence: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30_index.md:1-5 (generated 2026-04-19T02:19:34Z, canonical_sha af3d4c643cea, canonical_tokens 5924) vs current `git hash-object designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md` = 09abf17ac6390d9784766a9dacf52a7f02aad697 (different) and the file's actual content running to line 597 with §14.1-14.5 subsections (designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:529-597) absent from the index; designs/scene/derived_stats_v30_index.md:24 ('4.1 Vitality (survival resource)') vs designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:55 ('4.1 Health (survival resource) — AUTHORITATIVE'); tools/ci_co_file_checker.py:1-100 (full file — four rules, none referencing *_index.md or doc_index_gen.py output).

findings.claim: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md's own header carries two directly contradictory ## Status: lines (CANONICAL, then two lines later PROPOSAL — supersedes prior), while descriptor_registry.yaml (per the audit's own baseline) treats this file as authoritative — CLAUDE.md's rule that only a head's '## Status:' line can establish currency is undermined when that line itself is self-contradictory.
findings.evidence: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md:2 ('## Status: CANONICAL') and :4 ('## Status: PROPOSAL — supersedes prior derived_stats_v30.md').

coverage_notes: Swept via targeted grep-then-read (deterministic extraction, not full line-by-line reads of all ~6,200 lines across the 7 assigned .md heads plus combat_engine_v1/). Fully read: designs/scene/derived_stats_v30.md (all 597 lines) and its index (all 84 lines). Grep-targeted + spot-read: designs/scene/combat_v30.md (pool/Stamina/wound sections only, not the full 590 lines incl. weapon tables/maneuver list), designs/scene/social_contest_v30.md (Argue Pool/Composure/Concentration/Face/Persuasion Track passages, not the full 710 lines incl. proceeding-type tables and coalition rules beyond what's quoted), designs/provincial/mass_battle_v30.md (Pool/Command/TroopCount/Morale sections + header, not the full 966 lines incl. Parts B/D/E in depth beyond the Board-Game pool line and Part-C Morale citation), designs/territory/settlement_layer_v30.md (§1.3-§1.8 region + settlement-type/derived-value tables, not the full 780 lines incl. §2-§4 facility/governance detail), designs/threadwork/threadwork_v30.md (Thread Pool/TPS/Coherence formula restatements across all operation types, not the full 1,017 lines of Ob tables and lore), designs/npcs/npc_behavior_v30.md (Resonant Style/Conviction/Standing grep hits only, not the full 1,258 lines of per-NPC arc profiles), designs/scene/fieldwork_v30.md (Depth/Evidence Track/Pool passages, not the full 905 lines). designs/provincial/faction_behavior_v30.md, faction_canon_v30.md, faction_state_authoring_v30.md read for Mandate/Legitimacy/Popular Support sections specifically, not cover-to-cover. designs/scene/conviction_track_v30.md and designs/personal/conviction_track_v1.md read for their opening/naming sections only. NOT swept in this pass, flagged rather than silently skipped: designs/scene/combat_engine_v1/*.py (config.py, core.py, systems.py, combatant.py, etc.) beyond a one-line grep of config.py and the README — these are closer to sim/engine-code surface than F-DESIGN prose and a fuller pass would need the sim-code finder family; designs/factions/faction_systems_overview_v30.md (the named overview head) not opened; params/*.md files only touched twice for corroboration (factions_personal.md:14, glossary.md — both cross-family, cited only as supporting evidence for design-doc findings, not catalogued as F-DESIGN's own items); designs/scene/fieldwork_v30.md's fieldwork-action-type tables (§2-§3 detail) and designs/npcs/npc_behavior_v30.md's per-NPC arc-profile mechanical tables were not individually verified line-by-line for internal formula consistency beyond the grep hits shown. No conviction_track_v30_infill.md or conviction_track_v30_index.md content read (co-file pair of the per-territory Piety Track doc) — a follow-up pass should check whether that index is equally stale, mirroring F-DESIGN-7's finding for derived_stats. Board-game-mode formulas (mass_battle_v30.md Part B) were catalogued but not adversarially checked against params/board_game.md or params/bg/* (out of family).
